sect1.title: k3b-&kf6apps-version;
sect1.sect2:
Introduction to K3b
The K3b package contains a KDE Frameworks-based graphical interface to the Cdrtools and dvd+rw-tools CD/DVD manipulation tools. It also combines the capabilities of many other multimedia packages into one central interface to provide a simple-to-operate application that can be used to handle many of your CD/DVD recording and formatting requirements. It is used for creating audio, data, video and mixed-mode CDs as well as copying, ripping and burning CDs and DVDs.
Though k3b can be used to copy almost any DVD to similar medium, it does not provide a way to copy, or reproduce a dual-layer DVD onto a single-layer disk. Of course, there is not a program anywhere on any platform that can make an exact duplicate of a dual-layer DVD onto a single-layer disk, but there are programs on some platforms that can compress the data on a dual-layer DVD to fit on a single-layer DVD producing a duplicate, but compressed, image. If you need to copy the contents of a double-layer DVD to a single-layer disk, you may want to look at the RMLCopyDVD package.
&lfs130_checked;
Package Information
下载地址（HTTP）：
下载地址（FTP）：
MD5 校验和：&k3b-md5sum;
大小：&k3b-size;
预计所需磁盘空间：&k3b-buildsize;
预计构建时间：&k3b-time;
K3b Dependencies
Required
, , , and
The CD/DVD drive is detected at run time using , which must therefore be installed before running k3b.
Recommended
, , and
There are programs from three packages that k3b will look for at runtime: (required to burn CD-ROM media), (required to burn or format DVD media), and (required to burn CD-ROM media in DAO (Disk At Once) mode). If you don't need the capabilities provided by any of the three packages, you don't have to install them. However, a warning message will be generated every time you run the k3b program if any of them are not installed.
Optional Runtime
Optional
, , , , , and Musepack (libmpcdec)

sect2.title: Installation of K3b
sect2.para: Install K3b by running the following commands:

screen.userinput:
mkdir build && cd build &&
cmake -D CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=$KF6_PREFIX \ -D CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \ -D BUILD_TESTING=OFF \ -W no-dev .. && make

sect2.para: This package does not come with a test suite.

seglistitem.seg: libk3bdevice.so, libk3blib.so, and numerous plugin modules for the installed dependencies

listitem.para: is a graphical CD/DVD manipulation program
